is_off.description: Tests if one or more schedule blocks are currently not active.
is_off.name: Schedule is off

is_on.description: Tests if one or more schedule blocks are currently active.
is_on.name: Schedule is on

advance_schedule.description: Advances schedule to the next transition.
advance_schedule.name: Advance schedule

alter_schedule.description: Alters current schedule value, to a specified value.
alter_schedule.name: Alter schedule

boost_schedule.description: Alters schedule to a specified value, for a specified duration.

state.description: Alter schedule to this value, for the specified duration
state.name: Value

boost_schedule.name: Boost schedule

dump_schedule.description: Dumps schedule entries to the log file.
dump_schedule.name: Dump schedule

get_schedule.description: Retrieves the configured time ranges of one or multiple schedules.
get_schedule.name: Get schedule

refresh_schedule.description: Refresh schedule transitions, without reloading YAML.
refresh_schedule.name: Refresh schedule

vary_schedule.description: Varies schedule transitions times, within a specifies range, by a specified duration.

lookahead.description: Duration : the end of the range is this duration after "Normal"
lookahead.name: Lookahead

lookbehind.description: Duration : the start of the range is this duration before "Normal"
lookbehind.name: Lookbehind

normal.description: Date/time; specifies the centre point of range
normal.name: Normal

variation.description: Date/time; the difference from "Normal" specifies the amount of time to cvary transitions which are with the range
variation.name: Variation

vary_schedule.name: Vary schedule

turned_off.description: Triggers when a schedule block ends.
turned_off.name: Schedule block ended

turned_on.description: Triggers when a schedule block starts.
turned_on.name: Schedule block started
